title: 2007-2021 Toyota Tundra Rear Brake Pads And Rotors Replacement Instructions And E-Brake Adjustment
description: Master Technician shows the DIY how-to removal, service and installation procedure, including parking brake adjustment. The procedure also applies to the 2008-2021 Sequoia, LX570 and Land Cruiser LC200.

items.name: Genuine OEM Toyota rear brake pads
Genuine OEM Toyota rear brake rotors
Genuine OEM Toyota rear brake shims
Aftermarket rear brake pads/shims and rotors
Genuine Lexus/Toyota slider pin rubber grease
Genuine OEM Lexus/Toyota caliper grease for between pads and shims
Anti-seize lubricant for the pad slider area in the caliper
Small wire brushes for cleaning the calipers
Large wire brushes for cleaning the hub
1/2" drive cordless impact wrench kit to take the wheels off
1/2" torque wrench for tightening the wheels
3/8" drive flex head digital torque wrench
Automotive trim and clip removal kit
